requirement_topic.en: Cell and Module Safety — IEC 62619 and OSARTEC/OSN Conformity as Baseline for El Salvador BESS Project Acceptance
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯和模组安全——IEC 62619及OSARTEC/OSN合格评定作为萨尔瓦多BESS项目验收基准
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯和模組安全——IEC 62619及OSARTEC/OSN合格評定作為薩爾瓦多BESS項目驗收基準

summary.en: OSARTEC (Organismo Salvadoreño de Reglamentación Técnica) is the Salvadoran body responsible for technical regulations (reglamentos técnicos) and OSN (Organismo Salvadoreño de Normalización) is the national standards body. OSARTEC adopts or references international standards — primarily IEC and ISO — into Salvadoran technical regulations. As of the dataset date, no confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety technical regulation (reglamento técnico) specifically for stationary lithium battery energy storage systems has been identified from publicly accessible OSARTEC sources. Exporters must verify the current OSARTEC regulated-product scope directly before shipment. However, IEC 62619 (Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications) is the internationally expected safety standard for lithium BESS cells and modules, and El Salvador project owners, EPCs, and SIGET authorisation conditions for utility-scale and C&I storage projects are expected to reference IEC 62619 compliance as a technical prerequisite. IEC 62619 and IEC 62133 are also referenced for battery safety in the solar-plus-storage sector, which is growing in El Salvador driven by utility and distributed generation projects. Exporters should verify the current OSARTEC regulated-product list directly with OSARTEC before shipment.
summary.zh: OSARTEC（萨尔瓦多技术法规机构）是负责技术法规（技术法规）的萨尔瓦多机构，OSN（萨尔瓦多标准化机构）是国家标准机构。OSARTEC将国际标准——主要是IEC和ISO——采纳或引用到萨尔瓦多技术法规中。截至本数据集日期，未从可公开获取的OSARTEC来源确认任何专门针对固定式锂电储能系统的独立强制性BESS产品安全技术法规。出口商在出货前须直接向OSARTEC核实当前受监管产品范围。然而，IEC 62619（工业应用二次锂电芯和电池安全要求）是锂BESS电芯和模组的国际预期安全标准，萨尔瓦多项目业主、EPC承包商及SIGET对公用事业规模和工商业储能项目的授权条件，预计将以IEC 62619合规作为技术前提。IEC 62619和IEC 62133也在太阳能加储能行业的电池安全中被引用，该行业在萨尔瓦多因公用事业和分布式发电项目的推动而持续增长。出口商在出货前应直接向OSARTEC核实当前受监管产品清单。
summary.zht: OSARTEC（薩爾瓦多技術法規機構）是負責技術法規（技術法規）的薩爾瓦多機構，OSN（薩爾瓦多標準化機構）是國家標準機構。OSARTEC將國際標準——主要是IEC和ISO——採納或引用到薩爾瓦多技術法規中。截至本數據集日期，未從可公開獲取的OSARTEC來源確認任何專門針對固定式鋰電儲能系統的獨立強制性BESS產品安全技術法規。出口商在出貨前須直接向OSARTEC核實當前受監管產品範圍。然而，IEC 62619（工業應用二次鋰電芯和電池安全要求）是鋰BESS電芯和模組的國際預期安全標準，薩爾瓦多項目業主、EPC承包商及SIGET對公用事業規模和工商業儲能項目的授權條件，預計將以IEC 62619合規作為技術前提。IEC 62619和IEC 62133也在太陽能加儲能行業的電池安全中被引用，該行業在薩爾瓦多因公用事業和分布式發電項目的推動而持續增長。出口商在出貨前應直接向OSARTEC核實當前受監管產品清單。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62619:2022 — Safety Requirements for Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries for Use in Industrial Applications (internationally expected baseline for BESS cell/module safety in El Salvador project specifications)

IEC 62133-2:2017 — Secondary cells and batteries containing alkaline or other non-acid electrolytes — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries (referenced in battery safety in El Salvador energy storage context)

IEC 62933-5-1:2024 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety considerations — Hazard identification, risk assessment and risk mitigation (system-level safety standard expected in project specifications)
OSARTEC — Organismo Salvadoreño de Reglamentación Técnica (verify current regulated product list directly; no confirmed mandatory BESS-specific reglamento técnico as of dataset date)
OSN — Organismo Salvadoreño de Normalización (national standards body adopting IEC/ISO standards)

summary.en: China's primary mandatory standard for BESS cells from August 2025 is GB 44240-2024 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements), which replaces the prior GB/T 36276 series as the mandatory safety baseline for large-format BESS batteries over 100 kWh. The prior voluntary standard GB/T 36276-2023 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage) provides the technical framework for cells, modules, and battery clusters used in EES. These Chinese standards are not accepted as equivalents to IEC 62619 in El Salvador project specifications. Exporters must obtain IEC 62619 test evidence from an ILAC-accredited laboratory in addition to any Chinese GB compliance. Chinese GB standards are also 50 Hz-based and do not address 60 Hz application performance.
summary.zh: 自2025年8月起，中国BESS电芯的主要强制性标准为GB 44240-2024（电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成为100 kWh以上大型BESS电池的强制性安全基准。此前的自愿性标准GB/T 36276-2023（电力储能用锂离子电池）为EES中使用的电芯、模组和电池簇提供技术框架。上述中国标准不被萨尔瓦多项目规格接受为IEC 62619的等效依据。出口商除中国GB合规外，还须从ILAC认可实验室取得IEC 62619测试证据。中国GB标准也基于50 Hz，不涉及60 Hz应用性能。
summary.zht: 自2025年8月起，中國BESS電芯的主要強制性標準為GB 44240-2024（電化學儲能系統用二次鋰電池安全要求），取代原GB/T 36276系列，成為100 kWh以上大型BESS電池的強制性安全基準。此前的自願性標準GB/T 36276-2023（電力儲能用鋰離子電池）為EES中使用的電芯、模組和電池簇提供技術框架。上述中國標準不被薩爾瓦多項目規格接受為IEC 62619的等效依據。出口商除中國GB合規外，還須從ILAC認可實驗室取得IEC 62619測試證據。中國GB標準也基於50 Hz，不涉及60 Hz應用性能。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 — 电化学储能系统用二次锂电池安全要求 (Secondary Lithium Cells and Batteries Used in Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements; mandatory, effective August 1, 2025)
GB/T 36276-2023 — 电力储能用锂离子电池 (Lithium-Ion Batteries for Electrical Energy Storage; voluntary, effective July 1, 2024)

gap.en: Critical gap: El Salvador project owners and SIGET authorisation conditions reference IEC 62619 as the expected safety evidence for BESS cells and modules. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 are not harmonised with IEC 62619 and are not accepted as substitutes in project technical specifications. Exporters should: (a) verify the current OSARTEC regulated-product list for any mandatory pre-shipment conformity obligation for BESS cells or modules; (b) obtain IEC 62619 type-test certificates from an ILAC-accredited laboratory for cells and modules supplied to El Salvador BESS projects; (c) confirm the applicable IEC 62619 edition referenced in the project specification or SIGET authorisation conditions before committing to a test programme; (d) for solar-plus-storage projects: check whether IEC 62133 or other battery safety standards are specifically required by the project owner or SIGET in addition to IEC 62619.
gap.zh: 关键差距：萨尔瓦多项目业主和SIGET授权条件将IEC 62619作为BESS电芯和模组的预期安全证据。中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未与IEC 62619协调，不被项目技术规格接受为替代依据。出口商应：（a）核实当前OSARTEC受监管产品清单，确认是否存在针对BESS电芯或模组的强制装运前合格评定义务；（b）从ILAC认可实验室取得供应至萨尔瓦多BESS项目的电芯和模组的IEC 62619型式试验证书；（c）在启动测试计划前确认项目规格或SIGET授权条件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）对于太阳能加储能项目：核查项目业主或SIGET是否在IEC 62619之外专门要求IEC 62133或其他电池安全标准。
gap.zht: 關鍵差距：薩爾瓦多項目業主和SIGET授權條件將IEC 62619作為BESS電芯和模組的預期安全證據。中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023未與IEC 62619協調，不被項目技術規格接受為替代依據。出口商應：（a）核實當前OSARTEC受監管產品清單，確認是否存在針對BESS電芯或模組的強制裝運前合格評定義務；（b）從ILAC認可實驗室取得供應至薩爾瓦多BESS項目的電芯和模組的IEC 62619型式試驗證書；（c）在啟動測試計畫前確認項目規格或SIGET授權條件中引用的IEC 62619版本；（d）對於太陽能加儲能項目：核查項目業主或SIGET是否在IEC 62619之外專門要求IEC 62133或其他電池安全標準。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in project practice where SIGET or project-owner specifications require IEC 62619 compliance; OSARTEC mandatory regulatory obligation for stationary BESS has not been confirmed — verify directly with OSARTEC
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 44240-2024 is a mandatory national standard (GB designation) for lithium BESS cells over 100 kWh, effective August 1, 2025; GB/T 36276-2023 is voluntary

source.publisher: OSARTEC — Organismo Salvadoreño de Reglamentación Técnica (El Salvador)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] No confirmed standalone mandatory BESS product safety reglamento técnico has been identified for El Salvador as of the dataset date; however, IEC 62619 is the internationally expected technical baseline for BESS cell and module safety in El Salvador project specifications and SIGET authorisation conditions. Chinese GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 certification alone is not sufficient for El Salvador project acceptance. Verify OSARTEC current regulated-product scope and confirm IEC 62619 evidence requirements with the project owner, SIGET, and any appointed conformity assessment body before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至本数据集日期，萨尔瓦多尚无经确认的独立强制性BESS产品安全技术法规；然而，IEC 62619是萨尔瓦多项目规格和SIGET授权条件中BESS电芯和模组安全的国际预期技术基准。仅持有中国GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023认证不足以满足萨尔瓦多项目验收要求。出货前请核实OSARTEC现行受监管产品范围，并向项目业主、SIGET及任何指定合格评定机构确认IEC 62619证据要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至本數據集日期，薩爾瓦多尚無經確認的獨立強制性BESS產品安全技術法規；然而，IEC 62619是薩爾瓦多項目規格和SIGET授權條件中BESS電芯和模組安全的國際預期技術基準。僅持有中國GB 44240-2024和GB/T 36276-2023認證不足以滿足薩爾瓦多項目驗收要求。出貨前請核實OSARTEC現行受監管產品範圍，並向項目業主、SIGET及任何指定合格評定機構確認IEC 62619證據要求。
